structured_payload_candidate.title: Active Endpoints Based on Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The active endpoints for primary airflow setpoint vary with Zone Group mode: cooling maximum is Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup; 0 in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. Minimum is Vmin in Occupied; 0 in all other modes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set cooling maximum endpoint to Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup; 0 in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. Set minimum endpoint to Vmin in Occupied; 0 in Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.9.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
